hero.title: News & Updates
hero.subtitle: Product launches, partnerships, engineering insights, and company milestones.

sections.title: Prayaan Capital Crosses ₹500Cr in MSME Loan Disbursals
sections.excerpt: Prayaan Capital, an AI-native NBFC, announced today that it has crossed ₹500 crore in cumulative loan disbursals to MSMEs across 10 Indian states, powered by its proprietary AI underwriting engine.

items.title: Launching Instant Pre-Approved Loans for Repeat Borrowers
items.excerpt: Our AI now pre-scores existing borrowers, enabling instant top-up loans with zero additional documentation.

items.title: Prayaan Capital Partners with SIDBI for MSME Credit Guarantee
items.excerpt: Strategic partnership with SIDBI to offer credit guarantee-backed loans, reducing collateral requirements.

items.title: How Our AI Processes 200+ Data Points in Under 30 Seconds
items.excerpt: A deep dive into the machine learning pipeline that powers our real-time credit decisioning engine.

items.title: RBI's Digital Lending Guidelines: What It Means for MSMEs
items.excerpt: Our take on the latest regulatory framework and how compliant AI-native NBFCs are better positioned.

items.title: Named in India's Top 10 AI-Native Fintech Startups
items.excerpt: Recognized by FinTech Global for our innovative approach to AI-driven secured lending.

items.title: 10,000 MSMEs Funded — Here's What We Learned
items.excerpt: Reflections from our founding team on reaching this milestone and our roadmap ahead.
